chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S-100 of 2023 Appellant/complainant: Barkat Ali S/o Allah Ditto Pitafi, Through Mr. Nawab Ali Pitafi, Advocate Private respondent: Not on notice. Date of hearing: 22-11-2023. Date of decision: 22-11-2023. JUDGMENT IRSHAD ALI SHAH, J.-. The appellant by way of instant Criminal Acquittal Appeal has impugned the judgment dated 15.08.2023 whereby learned Additional Sessions Judge, Daharki has recorded the acquittal of the private respondents by extending them benefit of doubt. Instant appeal is barred by time by six days. No justification is advanced for condoning such delay. Even otherwise no illegality is noticed in impugned judgment which may justify this Court to make interference with the same by way of instant acquittal appeal. Consequently, it is dismissed in limine together with the listed applications. J U D G E ARBROHI/P.A
